title: Hissy Fit Comedy Night
description: Atlanta's best comics doing stand-up. Great energy, relaxed vibe — perfect for a couple who likes to laugh together. BYO atmosphere at a brewery.

title: HELD: Black Women and The Womb Opening
description: Powerful opening night celebrating Black women through art. Great conversation starter. Intimate gallery setting ideal for a thoughtful date.

title: Ilana Glazer (Broad City) Live
description: Ilana Glazer from Broad City brings her comedy tour to ATL. Hilarious, relatable, and way better than Netflix. Great for couples who share her humor.

title: Sting: 3.0 Tour
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park
description: Iconic Sting performing his catalog under the stars. Romantic outdoor concert — bring a blanket, pack some wine, make it an evening. Pure date magic.

title: Breakaway Music Festival
description: Two-day festival with major acts. Great for couples who love music festivals, dancing, and day-drinking vibes. May 15-16.

title: Don Toliver: Octane Tour
description: R&B/hip-hop vibes at State Farm Arena. Smooth sounds, great lighting — solid date-night concert option.

title: Jim Breuer: Find The Funny
description: Legendary comic (SNL, Half Baked) bring his tour to Atlanta. Old-school stand-up, great storytelling — if you like Dave Chappelle, you'll love Breuer.

title: Salsa & Bachata Night (Hangeo Thursdays)
description: Latin dance social — beginners welcome! Salsa and Bachata night. Great way to break a sweat together and learn something new. Perfect for couples.

title: Euro Atlanta: Reggae/Dancehall/Afrobeats Night
description: Reggae, Dancehall, Afrobeats, and Soca all night. Great dancing, good drinks, island vibes. A fun change of pace from the typical date scene.

title: Piedmont Park Green Market
description: Atlanta's iconic Saturday farmers market. Walk the vendors, grab fresh food, people-watch. Low-key, cute, no pressure — great morning date.

title: Spruill Gallery: 'Returns' Exhibition
description: Ongoing group exhibition featuring Hamidullah. Gallery is open Wed-Sun. Low-key, cultured date. Walk around, grab coffee after in Dunwoody.

title: Vegan & Friends Weekly Meetup
description: Atlanta's weekly vegan community meetup — every Wednesday, free admission. Great for veg-curious couples or plant-based foodies. Food vendors, mingling, good vibes.
